Section 1: Benchmark Configuration
==================================
mode=detailed
suite_tiers=extended
et_mode=paired
reactive_zero_skip=On
proactive_zero_run_skip=On
zero_run_order_mode=kernel
bit_column_skip=On
warmup_iterations=0
timed_repetitions=1
grouping_policies=OutputChannelModulo,TaskRoundRobin,ETAwareCostBalanced,ETAwareCostBalancedMemoryAware,BroadcastPhaseAwareFanoutBalanced
scenario_count=17
exactness_pass=PASS
primary_invariants_pass=PASS
